## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests cover the change
- [ ] Lint and type-check pass
- [ ] Manual smoke check (if UI / behavior changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if a public surface changed)
- [ ] No unrelated formatting churn in the diff
